category_sources: Official GitHub README describes ifuse as a FUSE filesystem for accessing iOS device contents.
source_facts.description says ifuse is a FUSE module for iOS devices.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository heading and README use ifuse.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README includes features, build instructions, usage, and manpage guidance.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/libimobiledevice/ifuse, so repo discovery was skipped per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README topics and usage mention FUSE, iOS, mounting, AFC, and command-line use.
source_facts.description identifies FUSE and iOS devices.
